description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the default image registry.gitlab.com/mazechazer/knobster and defining the stages prepare, test, build, and deploy. In the prepare stage add a ci-image job that runs on the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay, triggers only when ci/Dockerfile changes, and executes cd ci/, docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA" -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" ., docker login --username gitlab-ci-token --password "$CI_BUILD_TOKEN" "$CI_REGISTRY", docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA", docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest", and docker logout "$CI_REGISTRY". In the test stage add a test job that runs make test. In the build stage add a build job that runs make and archives the build directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that moves build/app/ to public/, publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
